response.overview: Shiva, a hyper-intelligent corporate manager, hides a fractured psyche permanently scarred by a brutal college rejection from his first love, Tanya. Unable to process the trauma, Shiva traps himself in a dangerous cycle of romantic delusions, misinterpreting basic workplace kindness from his colleague, Priya, as deep love. When Priya firmly tries to draw professional boundaries, Shiva's desperate obsession triggers a violent confrontation that ends in an irreversible tragedy. Fleeing his past, Shiva takes a corporate transfer to Delhi to start anew. However, when a new coworker, Khushi, enters his life with innocent warmth, the ghosts of his past resurface, plunging him back into a tailspin of paranoia and hallucinations where the lines between love and dangerous illusion completely blur.
response.tagline: Reality is a prison. Illusion is a choice.
response.title: Con Killer
